digest.component_or_area: identity resolve-or-mint seam and inbound reconciler wiring
propositions: An inbound external user with no local identity mapping mints a placeholder identity storing raw provider, external_id, and display_name.

ensure_identity_for resolves first via resolve_mapping and returns the existing identity id rather than creating a second, making re-runs yield one identity keyed on the provider's opaque external_id.
A placeholder identity is upgraded in place (title updated, tag removed) when a real mapping or better display_name later appears, reusing the same identity id.
The placeholder tag is set atomically on the CREATE event via a tags list forwarded to create_core, avoiding a tagless window, and is_placeholder checks that tag in compiled state.

The inbound apply path resolves the Jira assignee through ensure_identity_for('jira', accountId, displayName) additively and best-effort, falling back to name-only behavior when accountId is missing without failing the apply.
